user.title: BudgetBakers Wallet
user.description:
Enter your Wallet API token.
Get it from [BudgetBakers Settings](https://web.budgetbakers.com/settings/apiTokens).

accounts.title: Select Accounts
accounts.description: Choose which accounts you want to monitor.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your API token has expired or is invalid. Please enter a new one.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token. Please check your token and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to BudgetBakers API. Please check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

init.description: Configure the update interval for data polling.
